creator: jmorey@mmintl.com
text:
The system will not going into the s3 state.  It just keep running normally after running "acpiconf -s 3".I've tried going through the steps listed in https://wiki.freebsd.org/SuspendResume.  The output it requests follows. Please let me know if there is anything more I can do or provide.

"sysctl hw.acpi.supported_sleep_state"

hw.acpi.supported_sleep_state: S3 S4 S5

"dmesg"

FreeBSD is a registered trademark of The FreeBSD Foundation.
